title: Super simple In vivo Hoechst staining of unicellular protists
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gg6btze

steps.title: Add 1/1000 Hoechst dye (1 uL...
steps.instruction: Add 1/1000 Hoechst dye (1 uL into 1 mL volume of cells). Keep cells with dye protected from light.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes. Keep cells with dye protected from light. 00:10:00

steps.title: Resuspend with fresh growing medium
steps.instruction: Resuspend with fresh growing medium. Use minimum volume of medium in order to plate in to the slide immediately

steps.title: Mount your slide and ready for observation under microscope
steps.instruction: Mount your slide and ready for observation under microscope
